recommendedActions: Keep Operator Brief as the working panel for handoff; use Scheduler Pressure + GPU Hotspots to validate the two dominant narratives (mi3001x/mi2104x backlog; k002-004-v* thermal hotspots).

Re-run Job Correlation with expanded Slurm job->node/partition/user metadata (job IDs, user/account, nodelist, partition, GRES/GPU request) to close the attribution gap called out in the completed report.

If InfiniBand/SMART series exist in VictoriaMetrics but were omitted from the preview, re-run Fabric And Storage with explicit IB error counters + SMART attributes; otherwise treat it as informational/low-confidence.
hpcfund-cluster-observability.rationale: Planning reason is analysis-complete with preferred panel = operator-brief, so the layout prioritizes the completed handoff summary while keeping the most relevant supporting analyses (scheduler pressure, GPU thermals, and correlation) immediately adjacent. Lower-signal panels (fleet/fabric) remain accessible but grouped as deep-dives given the current evidence gaps. Collapsing Recent Runs and Source Preview reduces noise without changing the host shell or removing functionality.

recommendedActions: Start in Fleet Health: confirm chi-gpu-001 (degraded) and dal-storage-017 (warning) are still outliers; drill into node logs/processes and consider drain/mitigation.
Check Capacity Pressure next: validate whether mi3001x and mi2104x backlogs are demand-driven vs policy/QOS/reservation constraints vs down/drained capacity.
Use Operator Brief for handoff: copy urgent items and caveats into the shift log; include the inventory-sample coverage limitation.
Refresh/expand host-level queries in VictoriaMetrics to move from 4-host sample triage to fleet-wide ranking (72 instrumented hosts reported).
cluster-observability.rationale: Keeps the shell stable while emphasizing the user’s preferred Fleet Health as the focal panel, with Capacity Pressure adjacent for root-cause triangulation (scheduler backlog, saturation, thermals) and Operator Brief grouped separately for shift-handoff execution. Recent Runs and Source Preview are collapsed because analysis is already complete, reducing noise while preserving quick access for validation and refresh.
